# Canwell Interiors

> Family-run furnishings showroom at the Cotswold Design Centre in Broadway, Cotswolds. Carpets, curtains, blinds, furniture, soft furnishings, and free interior design help. Open seven days, free parking, dog-friendly. Trading since 2009.

## About

- Address: Cotswold Design Centre, Kennel Lane, Broadway WR12 7DJ
- Phone: 01905 964994
- Email: canwellcotswolds@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday to Saturday 9am to 5pm. Sunday 10am to 4pm.
- Position: Whole-home furnishings under one roof. Honest, unfussy, no commission selling, no project fees on design help.

## Sister businesses

- Saverys of Broadway: bespoke whole-home interior design
- Saverys of Ludlow: bespoke whole-home interior design
- xshowhome.com: online furniture range with UK delivery

## Pages

### Launch-essential
- [Homepage](/): Overview of what's in the showroom
- [Visit us](/visit): How to find Canwell, opening hours, what to expect
- [About](/about): The family behind the showroom
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, contact form

### What we do
- [Carpets and flooring](/carpets) and [measured and fitted carpets](/carpets/measured-and-fitted)
- [Curtains](/curtains): [made-to-measure](/curtains/made-to-measure) and [ready-made](/curtains/ready-made)
- [Blinds](/blinds): [made-to-measure](/blinds/made-to-measure)
- [Furniture](/furniture): [sofas](/furniture/sofas), [bedroom](/furniture/bedroom), [dining](/furniture/dining), [living room](/furniture/living-room), [home office](/furniture/home-office)
- [Soft furnishings, lighting, accessories](/soft-furnishings)
- [Design help](/design-help): [free in-store consultation](/design-help/in-store-consultation), [home visit](/design-help/home-visit)

### Brands we stock
- [Brands hub](/brands): every brand on the showroom floor
- [Richmond Interiors](/brands/richmond-interiors): upholstery and accessories
- [Hills Furniture](/brands/hills-furniture): solid hardwood dining and bedroom

### Areas we serve
- [Locations hub](/locations)
- [Cheltenham](/locations/cheltenham): twenty minutes via the A46
- [Stratford-upon-Avon](/locations/stratford-upon-avon): twenty-five minutes through the Cotswolds
